ogTitle: Macs Cove vs Madalya: Climate Safety

heading: Macs Cove vs Madalya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macs Cove, Victoria and Madalya, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Madalya has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Macs Cove (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macs Cove or Madalya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macs Cove has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Madalya scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macs Cove scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Madalya scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macs Cove or Madalya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Madalya has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
